title: Smoothie – compile a folder of data into a cited artifact agents can query
abstract: Smoothie efficiently compiles and organizes a folder of disparate data files into a coherent, structured format, streamlining data management and analysis.
abstract_zh: 这个Smoothie真是个数据整理小能手，把一桌子散乱的文件夹给捋顺了，结构清晰，管理分析起来轻松多了，妥妥的神器！感觉每次都能从混乱中抽丝剥茧找到规律，简直不要太爽。
